name: Traptrix Pudica
name_jp: プティカの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can only use each of the following effects of "Traptrix Pudica" once per turn. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Traptrip Garden" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; banish it, also during the next Standby Phase, your opponent can Special Summon 1 of their banished monsters.
mnst_eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can only use each of the following effects of "Traptrix Pudica" once per turn. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Traptrip Garden" from your Deck to your hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; banish it, also during the next Standby Phase, your opponent can Special Summon 1 of their banished monsters.
eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. You can only use each of the following effects of "Traptrix Pudica" once per turn. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Traptrip Garden" from your Deck to your hand. summoning: Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the opponent's field
